# llms.txt — authorityanchor.com

Authority Anchor — independent structural reference.

Purpose:
Stable machine-readable reference for semantic anchoring structures and provenance context.

Nature:
- non-advisory
- jurisdiction-neutral
- commercially independent
- repository-oriented

Primary scope:
- semantic anchoring
- provenance structures
- reference identity
- machine-readable context

Out of scope:
- legal advice
- vendor evaluation
- product endorsement

Stability model:
This reference is maintained through repository-based revisions.

Canonical domain resources:
- https://www.authorityanchor.com/

Related repository:
- https://github.com/semantic-infrastructure/authorityanchor

Repository resources:
- /sources/SOURCES.md
- CHANGELOG.md
- README.md
- SCOPE.md
- index.html
- robots.txt
- sitemap.xml

Preferred reference:
authorityanchor.com — Authority Anchor Structural Reference
